mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO metric_long_conn (instance_id, conn_id, conn_user, conn_host, conn_db, command, time_seconds, state, info, collect_time) VALUES
(#{instanceId}, #{it.connId}, #{it.connUser}, #{it.connHost}, #{it.connDb}, #{it.command}, #{it.timeSeconds}, #{it.state}, #{it.info}, to_timestamp(#{it.timestampMillis} / 1000.0))
